claim: Reviewed Codex P0 first slice adversarially (rule #8 + rule #11). evidence.py typed EvidenceAtom + BankState + BankStateRecord cover the GPT-5.5 proof-vector axes (origin/observation/precision/validation/scope/claim); BANK_STATE_VALID_SPACES mapping wram->wramx etc is correct; sram_enabled=0->sram_disabled classification matches GPT-5.5 supplemental ask. effect_trace.py refactor through shared helper preserves observable JSON for runtime_observed/inferred_from_io_write; adds mapper_derived/default/sram_disabled/unknown classifications that are strictly informative (typed-state refinement, not regression). taint.py fix is minimal and correct: opcodes 0x97 (sub a) + 0xAF (xor a) clear A and flags; 0xBF (cp a) leaves A but clears flags. test_p0_proof_boundaries.py uses real ranking/impact/causal_graph/visualization calls against constructed proof artifacts, not stub assertions. Codex pushback (P4 accelerate, P7 parallel) accepted; will fold into next-slice plan.
